caption:
The U.S. government is set to oversee the deployment of OpenAI's latest AI model, requiring approval for new users. This move comes as the Trump administration emphasizes national security concerns in AI technology. 4cc916

Is this a necessary measure for safety? 

Sources: Washington Post, Reuters

#AI #OpenAI #GovernmentPolicy #Technology #NationalSecurity #Innovation #AIEthics #TechNews #GPT5.6 #AIRegulation #OpenAIApproval

slides.headline: TRUMP ADMINISTRATION WILL VET USERS OF OPENAI'S GPT-5.6

slides.sub: This policy targets Anthropic and OpenAI's powerful AI technologies.
